subject: CIR.NO.266- Schedule & Bus Routes for 11th, 12th and 13th December 2025
body:
[image: logo1.jpg]

*            SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-2553023
*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/266
      Date: **9th December 2025*

       Always choose natural, whole foods over processed ones.


Dear Parents





Sai Ram!





Kindly note that the *Annual** Function of Bal Mandir and Senior School
will be held on **Friday, 12th December, 2025 and Saturday, 13th December,
2025 **respectively*. *The* *Grand Rehearsal for the same will be held on
Thursday, 11th December, 2025.*



*The Non-Participants of classes V-XII must be present for the Senior
School Function in proper School Uniform with blazer on Saturday, 13th
December, 2025.*



*Kindly note the schedule for 11th, 12th and 13th December, 2025.*

Looking forward to your cooperation.



With Best Regards






Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal
